title: PHP Comments
content:
### PHP Comments

Comments are lines of code that are not executed. They are used for documentation and debugging.

### Comment Types

| Type | Syntax | Usage |
|------|--------|-------|
| Single-line | `//` or `#` | Short notes |
| Multi-line | `/* ... */` | Longer explanations |
| DocBlock | `/** ... */` | PHPDoc documentation |

```php
<?php
// This is a single-line comment

# This is also a single-line comment

/*
This is a multi-line comment
spanning multiple lines
*/

/**
 * PHPDoc comment for documentation
 * @param string $name
 * @return string
 */
function greet($name) {
    return "Hello $name";
}
?>
```

> **Key Point:** Comments are ignored by the PHP interpreter and are purely for developers.
codeExample:
<?php
// Calculate total price
$price = 100;
$tax = 0.08;
/* Calculate final
   amount with tax */
$total = $price * (1 + $tax);
echo $total;
?>

quiz.question: Which characters start a single-line comment in PHP?
